creator: Dom.Mitchell@palmerharvey.co.uk
text:
Here's the latest version of fetchmail.

Fix: Here's the diff:



-- 
**********************************************************************
This email and any files transmitted with it are confidential and 
intended solely for the use of the individual or entity to whom they   
are addressed. If you have received this email in error please notify 
the system manager.

This footnote also confirms that this email message has been swept by 
MIMEsweeper for the presence of computer viruses.
**********************************************************************--d9Bmn90Xwy9WQsk9ISsSEpl05RNPXMYndqPu2uVGOdJEmp0G
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -urP /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail/Makefile fetchmail/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail/Makefile	Thu Dec 17 09:44:55 1998
+++ fetchmail/Makefile	Mon Feb 22 12:24:38 1999
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
 # does not need Python, so there is no RUN_DEPENDS for Python in
 # this Makefile.
 
-DISTNAME=       fetchmail-4.7.0
+DISTNAME=       fetchmail-4.7.7
 CATEGORIES=	mail
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.ccil.org/pub/esr/fetchmail/
 
diff -urP /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail/files/md5 fetchmail/files/md5
--- /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail/files/md5	Thu Dec 17 09:44:55 1998
+++ fetchmail/files/md5	Mon Feb 22 12:32:24 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (fetchmail-4.7.0.tar.gz) = b77ec659459cb225dd98324ba74e410c
+MD5 (fetchmail-4.7.7.tar.gz) = 915b74d5959b890feb71ce6a6af4e9b4
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A.
